title: Saved Sites Library
concept: A library-first Playground interface for plugin developers where saved, local, and temporary Playgrounds are the primary workspace, while creation routes, save destinations, and Site Manager tools appear as actions on the selected site.
flows: Select an unsaved Playground from the library, choose a distinct launch or import route, and start WordPress with visible route constraints.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with concrete copy progress and resulting saved state.
Manage the selected Playground identity with rename, delete, URL path navigation, Homepage, WP Admin, export to GitHub, and download zip actions.
Apply settings with reset and reload consequences visible before action.
Use Site Manager tabs for files, Blueprint JSON, database tools, logs, and a searchable Blueprint gallery with selected detail and run or inspect behavior.
featureCoverage: Import zip trigger and import-over-current warning
Featured blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save progress and resulting saved identity
WordPress version, PHP version, and language settings
Destructive reset and saved reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, and code editor
Blueprint copy link, download bundle, run, and editor
Database driver, path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Logs for Playground, WordPress, and PHP
